description.value: **Benefit:** As a standard action, you can attempt to smash an unattended inanimate object while attempting an Intimidate check (see Smashing an Object). If you break the object, you gain a bonus to the Intimidate check equal to half its hardness (minimum +1). If you destroy the object, the bonus is equal to its hardness (minimum +1). Creatures intimidated by this feat cannot be affected by it again for 24 hours.
